meta.title: About Us | L252 Media Production
meta.description: Meet the founders of L252 Media Production — Emmanuel Acosta and Jancarlos Reyes — and learn why we're passionate about serving churches and businesses with expert AV and IT solutions.

About.heroSubtitle: Expert AV Solutions with IT Support You Can Trust — built on a passion for helping organizations communicate with clarity and impact.
About.intro1: L252 Media Production exists to help churches and businesses communicate their message with the clarity, quality, and reliability it deserves. We believe that great technology should serve the mission — not get in the way of it.
About.intro2: Our team brings hands-on experience in audio-visual installation, live event production, IT infrastructure, and technical training. We've worked in environments ranging from small community churches to large-scale business events, and we bring the same level of care and professionalism to every project.
About.intro3: What sets us apart is our commitment to the people we serve. We don't just install equipment and disappear. We take the time to understand your space, your team, and your goals — and we stay engaged to make sure everything works the way it should, long after the project is done.
About.foundersSubtitle: L252 is led by two professionals whose combined expertise covers the full spectrum of media production and IT — united by a shared commitment to serving people well.

founders.name: Emmanuel Acosta
bio: With over 15 years of experience in the film and media industry, Emmanuel Acosta is a seasoned cinematographer and editor known for his versatility and creative precision. His expertise spans audio engineering, lighting design, livestreaming, and camera operation, allowing him to handle multiple aspects of production with ease. Emmanuel has contributed to a diverse range of projects, including cinematic productions, commercials, live events, and corporate videos, delivering high-quality visuals that resonate with audiences.

Whether capturing compelling footage or crafting seamless narratives in the editing suite, Emmanuel excels at turning ideas into captivating visual stories. His in-depth knowledge of livestreaming technologies, combined with hands-on experience in video and audio production, ensures technical excellence in every project. From live broadcasts and music videos to interviews and branded content, Emmanuel's collaborative approach and attention to detail have earned him a reputation as a trusted professional in the evolving media landscape.

founders.name: Jancarlos Reyes
bio: Jancarlos Reyes is a highly experienced IT professional with over 10 years in IT infrastructure, networking, and modern workplace solutions. He has extensive expertise in Microsoft 365 and Google Workspace, leveraging these platforms for more than 7 years to streamline operations, improve collaboration, and enhance productivity across businesses, nonprofits, and churches. Jancarlos also holds a Dante Level 3 certification, highlighting his advanced skills in audio networking and proficiency with complex AV systems.

With 15+ years of experience supporting nonprofit organizations and churches, Jancarlos has developed a deep understanding of their unique technological needs. His expertise extends to network design, server management, IT support, and cloud services, providing seamless and secure technology solutions. Passionate about bridging the gap between technology and mission, Jancarlos empowers organizations to thrive by integrating the latest tools and innovations. Whether managing cloud platforms, optimizing AV systems, or coordinating live events, his technical expertise and collaborative mindset make him a valuable partner for clients and teams alike.

values.title: Excellence
values.body: We hold ourselves to a high standard in everything we do — from the quality of our installations to the clarity of our communication.

values.title: Simplicity
values.body: Technology should feel empowering, not overwhelming. We design systems and train teams with usability in mind.

values.title: Service
values.body: We are genuinely invested in the success of the organizations we work with. Your mission drives our work.

About.ctaSubtitle: Whether you have a specific project in mind or just want to explore your options, we'd love to hear from you.

meta.title: Services | L252 Media Production
meta.description: AV installation, event production, IT & network infrastructure, and training for churches and businesses.

Services.heroSubtitle: End-to-end AV and IT solutions for churches and businesses — designed, installed, and supported by our team.
Services.ctaSubtitle: Reach out and tell us about your goals. We'll help you figure out the right solution.

items.title: AV Installation
items.description: Elevate your worship services or business presentations with custom audio-visual installations. From projectors and sound systems to livestream setups, we design and install solutions that enhance the message and ensure every seat enjoys crystal-clear audio and engaging visuals.

items.title: Event Production
items.description: Bring your church or business events to life with professional event production services. Whether it's a worship concert, conference, or special celebration, we handle sound, lighting, and visuals to create a seamless, impactful experience that engages your audience and leaves lasting memories.

items.title: IT & Network
items.description: Empower your organization with reliable IT and network infrastructure. From secure Wi-Fi for staff and guests to seamless connectivity for livestreaming, our solutions ensure your ministry or business stays connected — online and offline.

items.title: Training
items.description: We offer hands-on training in audio, projection, and livestreaming to help you master the essentials. Our approach breaks down complex concepts into simple, practical steps, minimizing technical jargon and empowering you with the confidence to operate independently.

meta.title: AV Installation | L252 Media Production
meta.description: Custom audio-visual installations for churches and businesses — projectors, sound systems, and livestream setups designed to enhance your space.

AVInstallation.title: AV Installation
AVInstallation.tagline: Elevate every service, meeting, and message with professional audio-visual systems built for your space.
AVInstallation.description: We design and install custom audio-visual solutions for churches and businesses of all sizes. From projectors and screens to surround sound systems and full livestream setups, every installation is tailored to ensure that every seat in your space enjoys crystal-clear audio and engaging visuals. Whether you're starting from scratch or upgrading an existing system, our team handles design, installation, and configuration from end to end.

highlights.heading: Projectors & Display Systems
highlights.body: High-brightness projectors, LED walls, and screens sized and positioned for maximum visibility in your space.

highlights.heading: Sound Systems
highlights.body: Professionally tuned speaker systems, subwoofers, and monitor mixes that deliver clear, even audio across every seat.

highlights.heading: Livestream Infrastructure
highlights.body: Camera setups, capture hardware, encoding equipment, and platform integration for reliable, high-quality live broadcasts.

highlights.heading: Stage & Lighting
highlights.body: Stage lighting design and installation that creates the right atmosphere — from intimate gatherings to large-scale productions.

highlights.heading: Control Systems
highlights.body: User-friendly control panels and automation so your team can operate complex AV systems with confidence.

highlights.heading: Cable Management & Infrastructure
highlights.body: Clean, organized cabling and infrastructure that keeps your system reliable and easy to maintain long-term.

meta.title: Event Production | L252 Media Production
meta.description: Professional event production for churches and businesses — sound, lighting, and visuals for concerts, conferences, and special celebrations.

EventProduction.title: Event Production
EventProduction.tagline: Bring your events to life with professional sound, lighting, and visuals that create moments people remember.
EventProduction.description: Whether you're hosting a worship concert, corporate conference, community celebration, or special service, our event production team ensures everything runs smoothly. We handle the full technical picture — audio mixing, stage lighting, video projection, and on-site coordination — so you can focus on your audience and your message. We serve churches and businesses alike, bringing the same level of care and professionalism to every event.
EventProduction.ctaText: Let's make your next event unforgettable.

highlights.heading: Live Sound Mixing
highlights.body: Experienced audio engineers managing front-of-house and monitor mixes for bands, speakers, and hybrid formats.

highlights.heading: Stage Lighting Design
highlights.body: Dynamic lighting that sets the right tone — from vibrant concert atmospheres to polished corporate presentations.

highlights.heading: Video & Projection
highlights.body: Live IMAG, lyrics, slides, and video playback managed with precision to keep your audience engaged.

highlights.heading: Livestream Production
highlights.body: Multi-camera live broadcasts with graphics, transitions, and reliable streaming so your remote audience feels present.

highlights.heading: Equipment Rental & Setup
highlights.body: We bring the gear your event needs — microphones, speakers, lighting rigs, cameras — and set it all up.

highlights.heading: On-Site Technical Support
highlights.body: Our crew stays for the duration of your event, handling troubleshooting and adjustments in real time.

meta.title: IT & Network | L252 Media Production
meta.description: Reliable IT and network infrastructure for churches and businesses — secure Wi-Fi, connectivity for livestreaming, and ongoing IT support.

ITNetwork.title: IT & Network
ITNetwork.tagline: Keep your organization connected with reliable, secure network infrastructure built for modern ministry and business.
ITNetwork.description: A strong network is the backbone of everything you do — from livestreaming services to accepting digital giving to enabling your team to work efficiently. We design and deploy IT and network solutions tailored to churches and businesses, ensuring dependable connectivity for staff, guests, and media operations. Whether you need a fresh infrastructure buildout or an upgrade to your existing setup, we handle it with care and long-term reliability in mind.
ITNetwork.ctaText: Ready for a network that works as hard as you do?

highlights.heading: Secure Wi-Fi Networks
highlights.body: Segregated networks for staff, guests, and AV systems — ensuring security, performance, and reliability across your facility.

highlights.heading: Livestream Connectivity
highlights.body: Wired and wireless infrastructure optimized for consistent, high-bandwidth video uploads with minimal latency or drops.

highlights.heading: Structured Cabling
highlights.body: Professional CAT6 installation with clean cable management, labeling, and documentation for easy future maintenance.

highlights.heading: Network Hardware & Routing
highlights.body: Enterprise-grade routers, switches, and access points configured for performance, security, and easy management.

highlights.heading: IT Support & Maintenance
highlights.body: Ongoing support, software updates, hardware troubleshooting, and monitoring so your systems stay running when it matters.

highlights.heading: Workstation & Device Setup
highlights.body: Setup and configuration of computers, tablets, and peripheral devices for staff and production teams.

meta.title: Training | L252 Media Production
meta.description: Hands-on AV and livestream training for churches and businesses — audio, projection, and broadcasting made simple and practical.

Training.title: Training
Training.tagline: Gain the confidence to run your own systems — we teach practical skills without the technical overwhelm.
Training.description: Great equipment is only as effective as the people operating it. Our training program is designed to help your volunteers and staff master audio, projection, and livestreaming at their own pace. We strip away the jargon and focus on the practical steps that matter for your specific setup. Whether you're onboarding new volunteers or upskilling your existing team, we'll build their confidence so your ministry or business can operate independently and with excellence.
Training.ctaText: Empower your team to operate with confidence.

highlights.heading: Audio Operations
highlights.body: Hands-on training covering mixing boards, microphone techniques, monitor mixes, and live sound fundamentals for your specific system.

highlights.heading: Projection & Presentation
highlights.body: Learn to run ProPresenter, EasyWorship, or other presentation software — including slide management, transitions, and troubleshooting.

highlights.heading: Livestream Production
highlights.body: Camera operation, switching, encoding, and platform management (YouTube, Facebook, and more) for live and recorded broadcasts.

highlights.heading: Volunteer Onboarding
highlights.body: Structured training programs that bring new volunteers up to speed quickly with role-specific guides and supervised practice.

highlights.heading: Troubleshooting & Problem Solving
highlights.body: We teach your team how to diagnose and fix common issues on the fly — so technical hiccups don't derail your services or events.

highlights.heading: Custom Training Plans
highlights.body: Training sessions tailored to your team's current skill level, your specific equipment, and your schedule.

meta.title: Privacy Policy | L252 Media Production
meta.description: Privacy policy for L252 Media Production — how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.

PrivacyPolicy.intro: At L252 Media Production, we are committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy outlines how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
PrivacyPolicy.personalInfoText: We may collect your name, email address, phone number, and other details when you fill out forms on our website.
PrivacyPolicy.usageDataText: We collect data about how you interact with our website, such as IP address, browser type, and time spent on our pages.
useList: To provide our AV and IT/Network installation services.
To communicate with you regarding your inquiries or billing.
To improve our website and services based on your usage patterns.
PrivacyPolicy.cookiesText: We use cookies and similar technologies to track user interactions on our website and improve user experience. Cookies are small files that are stored on your device. You can disable cookies through your browser settings; however, this may affect some functionalities of our website.
PrivacyPolicy.dataRetentionText: We retain personal information for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes for which it was collected, unless a longer retention period is required by law.
PrivacyPolicy.thirdPartyText: We use InvoiceNinja to issue invoices, and payments are processed securely through Stripe and PayPal. L252 Media Production does not store payment information. Please review the privacy policies of <stripe>Stripe</stripe> and <paypal>PayPal</paypal> for more details.
PrivacyPolicy.dataDeletionText: If you wish to request the deletion of your personal information, please contact us at <email>privacy@twomediapros.com</email>. We will respond to your request within the timeframe required by applicable law.
PrivacyPolicy.dataSecurityText: We use industry-standard security measures to protect your information from unauthorized access or disclosure.
PrivacyPolicy.changesText: We may update this policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page, and, where appropriate, notified to you via email. Please review this policy periodically to stay informed.

meta.title: Terms of Service | L252 Media Production
meta.description: Terms of service for L252 Media Production — governing your use of our website and services.

Terms.intro: These terms govern your use of L252 Media Production's website and services.
Terms.servicesProvidedText: L252 Media Production specializes in AV and IT/Network installations. All services provided are subject to these terms.
Terms.paymentsText: Invoices for services will be issued through InvoiceNinja, and payments can be made via Stripe or PayPal. By making a payment through one of these platforms, you also agree to the terms and conditions of Stripe and PayPal. L252 Media Production does not store payment information and is not responsible for any issues arising from the use of these payment processors.
Terms.refundPolicyText: We offer refunds for payments made within 15 days of the invoice date. Refunds will only be issued if the service has not commenced or if there is a mutual agreement. Please contact us within this timeframe to request a refund.
Terms.clientResponsibilitiesText: You are responsible for providing accurate information when engaging our services and for timely communication. Failure to provide necessary information or cooperation may result in delays or additional costs.
Terms.limitationOfLiabilityText: To the fullest extent permitted by law, L252 Media Production shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of our services or website. Our total liability to you for any claim shall not exceed the amount paid for the services provided.
Terms.intellectualPropertyText: All content on this website, including text, images, and branding, is the intellectual property of L252 Media Production and may not be used without our permission.
Terms.modificationsText: We reserve the right to modify or discontinue our services at any time, with or without notice.
Terms.governingLawText: These terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of New York, without regard to its conflict of law principles.
